title: Pseudananas macrodontes
taxonomy: Pseudananas macrodontes is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae, commonly known as the pineapple family. It is native to the tropical regions of South America. The genus Pseudananas is a single-species genus, and the species is considered to be part of the Bromeliaceae family. The classification of Pseudananas macrodontes is also supported by molecular phylogenetic studies. It is closely related to other bromeliads, which are epiphytes or terrestrial plants that thrive in humid environments.
